dj_text: That was Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Theme - [Medieval Ninja Style? - Sort of - Cover / Bardcore]. Now let's pretend we're in a coffee shop with Sia - Chandelier (Medieval Style). And then there was one. Last track after this.
commercial_text: Brought to you by NoodleCorp — we put noodles in everything. Noodle soup. Noodle salad. Noodle coffee. Noodle mattress.
hijack_text: Welcome to Corporate Radio MAX from Kosmos Sigma-9.
recovery_text: They're gone. We're back. Don't ask which 'they' — you don't want to know.
title: Sia - Chandelier (Medieval Style)
